user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable interview panel support, so that panels can be used in the recruitment process
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Interview Panels screen; When I answer Yes to "Do you support interview panel ?" and click Save; Then panel support is enabled

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new interview panel, so that a group of interviewers can be assigned to rounds
acceptance_criteria: Given panel support is enabled; When I click Add new panel and enter a Panel name and Description; Then the panel is created and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing panel, so that I can keep panel members and descriptions up to date
acceptance_criteria: Given a panel is listed; When I click Edit and change its details; Then the updated panel is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view panels with their name and description, so that I can review all configured panels
acceptance_criteria: Given panels exist; When I open the Interview Panels list; Then each panel shows its Panel name and Description

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through and refresh the panel list, so that I can navigate all 126 panels
acceptance_criteria: Given more panels exist than fit on one page; When I use pagination or Refresh; Then the next set of panels is shown
